name: Sharetronic Data Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Sharetronic Data Technology Co., Ltd. operates as a solution provider in wireless network and smart terminal worldwide. The company production lines primarily focuses on Internet of things, smart home, and car networking. It offers virtual reality products, such as VR headsets; laptops; WiFi IP cameras; and NAs storage products. Sharetronic Data Technology Co., Ltd. was founded in 2005 and is based in Shenzhen, China.
